Hello!!! This time, Ive done a Lethal Company bot, and the Bracken is the first of the series (Yes, i know I'm already doing a Rain World Lizard series but thats gonna continue it with my next bot). You have formed a bond with this guy, and he’s even picked up a bit of language from you. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
